The '''Pendarran Warriors''' were a military group led by [[Gendal Delan]], who worked closely with the [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]] and [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].<ref name="WBC" /> The Pendarran Warriors fought at the [[Battle of Dreighton]]. During the [[Great Jedi Purge/Legends|Great Jedi Purge]], the Pendarran Warriors were wiped out by [[Palpatine/Legends|Emperor Palpatine's]] [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] troops. Gendal's son, [[Kolor Delan]] later formed an armed organization, [[Pendarran's Revenge]], named after his father's group.<ref name="WBC" />
